prerequisites: A GitBook account with access to the space you want to sync.
A GitBook personal access token generated from your account's Developer settings.
The space ID of the GitBook space to read, used as the spaceId path parameter in the API.

authMethods.name: Personal access token
authMethods.summary: GitBook authenticates API requests with a personal access token sent using the Bearer scheme in the Authorization header (Authorization: Bearer <access_token>). The token grants the same access and privileges as the GitBook user account it belongs to. Provide it as the connector's access_token field.

setupSteps.title: Generate a personal access token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to GitBook and open the Developer settings of your user account, where access tokens are viewed and managed. Create a token and copy its value; you can revoke it later from the same settings if it is compromised.

setupSteps.title: Provide the access token
setupSteps.body: Enter the personal access token into the connector's access_token field. The connector sends it as Authorization: Bearer <access_token> on every API request to https://api.gitbook.com.

setupSteps.title: Identify and set the space ID
setupSteps.body: Determine the unique ID of the GitBook space you want to read. This value is used by the API as the spaceId path parameter (for example GET /spaces/{spaceId}). Enter it in the connector's space_id field.
